content_body:
Cabin Rentals of Georgia is committed to making your visit to the North Georgia Mountains and your vacation in our luxury cabin rentals an experience to remember. As nature itself provides healing and health with clean mountain air, abundant wildlife, wildflowers, and water to restore spirit and soul, we are happy to recommend the following therapeutic services to help restore and rejuvenate your body as well.

A relaxing session of massage will enhance your getaway, whether you choose to unwind at the beginning of your stay with a therapist trained in working out the physical stress in our bodies or to finish the trip after a time of strenuous activities such as hiking, horseback riding, whitewater rafting or other adventures enjoyed while here in Blue Ridge.

An in-cabin massage is also a wonderful gift for yourself or a loved one. Indulge in a healing experience to enhance your time in the beautiful North Georgia Mountains and make your celebration unique and memorable. 

  • Birthdays
  • Anniversaries
  • Wedding Parties
  • Girls' Weekend
  • Corporate Retreat Rewards for promotions and achievements
  • Family Reunions
  • Clubs and groups such as fly-fishing, biking, hiking and horseback riding

Cabin Rentals of Georgia wishes you a complete healing experience to restore body, mind, and soul.
title: Massage & Spa
